summary: Role management features testing complete. All 18 backend tests pass. UI tests confirm: 1) Role dropdown shows all 5 roles (Jogador, Treinador Principal, Treinador Adjunto, Delegado, Responsável/Familiar), 2) Admin can toggle admin role for other members via 'Tornar Admin' menu option, 3) Nationality field visible in Profile page under Identity tab, 4) team_roles mapping is saved correctly when adding members to teams, 5) RBAC system working correctly.

role_selection_when_adding_member.notes: Role dropdown appears in 'Adicionar Membro' dialog when viewing a specific team

admin_toggle_for_members.restrictions: Admin cannot remove own admin role (returns 400)

team_roles_mapping.notes: team_roles dict correctly maps team_id to role when adding member to team

tests: Admin has full access to all resources
Permissions endpoint returns correct role flags

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in update_user endpoint where profile.nationality update failed when profile was null - added initialization step before nested field update
context_for_next_testing_agent: Role management features fully tested. New endpoints: PUT /users/{id}/admin-role (toggle admin), PUT /teams/{team_id}/members/{user_id}/role (update team role), POST /users/link-players (link family to multiple players). Profile now has nationality field. team_roles dict maps team_id to role for multi-role per team support.

bug_fixed.description: Fixed MongoDB error 'Cannot create field nationality in element {profile: null}'
bug_fixed.root_cause: update_user endpoint tried to set nested field profile.nationality when profile was null
bug_fixed.fix: Added initialization step to create empty profile object before setting nested fields
